title: Diallel analysis of forage yield and quality characters in sorghum
abstract: Two 8 X 8 diallel analyses were conducted to examine heritability of green forage yield per plant, dry-matter digestibility, crude protein, total soluble solids and dry-matter percentage in Sorghum bicolor. Dry-matter digestibility, total soluble solids and dry-matter percentage were predominantly governed by additive gene action whereas dominance variance was more important for the expression of green forage yield per plant and crude protein
publication: Egyptian Journal of Genetics and Cytology
